name: Backdoor IAM User with Additional Access Key
description: Simulates an attacker creating a second access key for an existing IAM user, giving them persistent programmatic access even if the original key is rotated. A single iam:CreateAccessKey call is the only CloudTrail evidence.
prerequisites: IAM user with no existing access keys (stratus-red-team-backdoor-user-target)
detection_signal: iam:CreateAccessKey on an existing user where the requesting principal is NOT the user themselves — indicates an external actor creating credentials
